summary: The diff implements most requirements well: frontend components (Hero, Menu, About, Contact, Footer, Navigation, SectionDivider), backend Motoko actor, styling, and typography. However, the backend actor is missing pre-seeded data (REQ-3 AC), the Motoko actor lacks a grouped-by-category query (REQ-3 AC), and the generated image assets are referenced but not actually present in the diff (REQ-8). The hero CTA uses 'Explore Our Menu' instead of the specified 'View Menu', which is a minor deviation.

missing_requirements.requirement: All data is pre-seeded with realistic Indian Garden Chicago content; backend exposes a query to retrieve all menu items grouped by category
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo actor defines empty data structures (Map.empty, null restaurantInfo, empty specialties) with no pre-seeded menu items, restaurant info, or specialties. There is no initialization logic or stable pre-populated data. Additionally, getMenuItems() returns a flat array, not grouped by category as required by the AC.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate static image assets (mandala hero background, food spread banner, restaurant ambiance illustration, restaurant logo) and place them in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files under frontend/public/assets/generated/. The components reference image paths like /assets/generated/hero-mandala-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, /assets/generated/food-spread-banner.dim_1400x600.png, /assets/generated/restaurant-ambiance.dim_1200x800.png, and /assets/generated/restaurant-logo.dim_300x300.png, but none of these image files appear in the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Email/Mail contact info card displayed in the Contact section with a Mail icon
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies address, phone, operating hours, and Google Maps embed for the Contact section. An email field was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking in the Footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any caffeine.ai branding or attribution. This was added without being requested.
